texto: I don't remember ever deciding to become a performer. I just always was. I began performing by mimicking the performers on the new television that first took the attention away from me as the baby of the household. I continued performing to put a smile on my grandmother's face and always considered her when accepting or declining roles.
explicacao: Citação de T'Keyah Crystal Keymah sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't remember ever deciding to become a performer. I just always was. I began performing by mi…” articula familia, baby, me em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como me e remember.

frase_original: I don't remember ever deciding to become a performer. I just always was. I began performing by mimicking the performers on the new television that first took the attention away from me as the baby of the household. I continued performing to put a smile on my grandmother's face and always considered her when accepting or declining roles.
